title: Implement Admin User Status Update API
description: Create an admin-only API endpoint to update a user's status (e.g., to 'Blocked' or 'Active').
ai_instructions: This endpoint must be protected by the admin authorization middleware. The handler should update the user's status in the database. Implement the business logic to prevent an admin from blocking their own account.
execution_steps: Add new test cases to 'tests/admin.test.ts' for the 'PUT /admin/users/:id/status' endpoint.
Include tests for successfully changing another user's status, and for the failed attempt of an admin blocking themselves.
Run tests to see them fail.
Add the protected 'PUT /admin/users/:id/status' route to the Express app.
Implement the service logic to update the status in the database while checking for the self-blocking condition.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-011' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: Endpoint is only accessible to admins.
An admin can successfully change another user's status.
An admin is prevented from blocking their own account.
All tests for the feature pass.
